attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
CREATION_DATE  ,               
SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS,         
PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS  ,        
CANCELLED_FLAG         ,       
ATTRIBUTE19             ,      
DEMAND_CLASS_CODE        ,     
ATTRIBUTE4                ,    
TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG            ,   
BOOKED_DATE                 ,  
SOLD.SOLD_TO_SUBJECT_ID SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID           , 
BILL.BILL_TO_SUBJECT_ID INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID         ,
SHIP.SHIP_TO_SUBJECT_ID SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID            ,
ATTRIBUTE18                   ,
HEADER_ID                     ,
ORG_ID                        ,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME           ,
PAYMENT_TERM_ID               ,
SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCOOHA.CREATED_BY,
SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
BILL.BILL_TO_SUBJECT_ID AS BILL_TO_SUBJECT_ID,
SCOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT,
SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT, 
SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
'CG' SS_CODE,
CASE WHEN  SCOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF LIKE 'AA%' THEN SCOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF ELSE   NULL END SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM,
SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13 AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,
SCOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
coalesce(SCOOHA.attribute3, 'N'),
COALESCE(SCOOHA.ORDER_DATE_TYPE_CODE,'SHIP'),
ECCI.END_CUST_TO_SUBJECT_ID  END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_ID /*Added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SCOOHA
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT	HCAR.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID,HCAR.GLOBAL_NAME,HER.SUBJECT_ID AS BILL_TO_SUBJECT_ID   
FROM	
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES HCAR
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS HER  
ON	HCAR.PARTY_ID = HER.PARTY_ID) BILL
ON 	BILL.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID = SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID
AND BILL.GLOBAL_NAME  = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
/* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr */
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT	HCAR.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID,HCAR.GLOBAL_NAME,HER.SUBJECT_ID AS SOLD_TO_SUBJECT_ID   
FROM	
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES HCAR
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS HER  
ON	HCAR.PARTY_ID = HER.PARTY_ID) SOLD
ON 	SOLD.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID = SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID
AND SOLD.GLOBAL_NAME  = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT	HCAR.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID,HCAR.GLOBAL_NAME,HER.SUBJECT_ID AS SHIP_TO_SUBJECT_ID   
FROM	
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES HCAR
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS HER  
ON	HCAR.PARTY_ID = HER.PARTY_ID) SHIP
ON 	SHIP.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID = SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID
AND SHIP.GLOBAL_NAME  = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME

/* priyavij: Added as a part of Q2FY16*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT	HCAR.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID,HCAR.GLOBAL_NAME,HER.SUBJECT_ID AS END_CUST_TO_SUBJECT_ID   
FROM	
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES HCAR
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS HER  
ON	HCAR.PARTY_ID = HER.PARTY_ID
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) ECCI
ON ECCI.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID = SCOOHA.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_ID
AND ECCI.GLOBAL_NAME  = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME

SELECT                
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 							SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 							BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  						BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE 							BK_COMPANY_CODE,
SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT                SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
SCOOHA.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
CAST(CAST(SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	START_SSP_DATE,
CAST(SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE 	AS TIMESTAMP(0)) START_TV_DTM,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	END_SSP_DATE,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))	END_TV_DTM,
'=' AS AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,
SCOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS       SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE19 ORDER_PROMOTION_CD,
0.00 ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT,
'=' AS SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
SCOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
COALESCE(NPPT_BILL.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY , 
COALESCE(NPPT_SHIP.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,-999) SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY   ,
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID,
NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT  ,
COALESCE(NPPT_SOLD.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,-999) SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,
SCOOHA.SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM  ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
CASE WHEN (NCST.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NSOE.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG, 
SCOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS COMPLETE_ORDER_DTM,  /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
CASE 
                WHEN   SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL THEN 'N' 
                WHEN   SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 LIKE '%TAA%' THEN 'Y' 
ELSE      'N' END       AS SO_TAA_FLG  , 
CASE     
WHEN SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL THEN NULL 
                WHEN   SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 = 'TAA' THEN NULL 
                WHEN   SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IN ('TAA-DO', 'DO' ) THEN 'DO' 
                WHEN   SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IN ('TAA-DX', 'DX' ) THEN 'DX' 
ELSE      NULL END       AS SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  ,  
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  as REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY,/*NEED TO CHECK */
SCOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG,
'=' AS SO_GSA_FLG,
'='  AS SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
EAPT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME  AS BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME ,
NULL SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
NULL SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
NULL SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
NULL PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY, /*TBD */
CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0))  SO_CLOSED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
CASE WHEN NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME IS NOT NULL THEN 'BOOKED' ELSE '=' END CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
'=' AS DROP_SHIP_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD,/*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
NULL AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR,
COALESCE(SCOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,'=')  AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,
SCOOHA.attribute3 AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG,
NULL RU_CTMP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
NULL RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
'=' RU_TRADE_IN_ROLE,
CASE WHEN NSOT.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME LIKE '%Trade-In%' THEN SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY ELSE -999 END  RU_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
'=' AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
-777 AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
CAST(NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME  AS DATE) AS DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,
NULL AS CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE18 SOURCE_REPORTED_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
 'NOT FOUNDATION' FOUNDATION_ORDER_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
'UNK' AS COUNTRY_ENABLEMENT_COUNTRY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
'Y' AS SO_IN_CG1_FLG,
'N' AS SO_IN_SJ_FLG,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SO_RETURN_DUE_DTM,
 CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS DV_SO_RETURN_DUE_DT,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DTM,
 CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_DV_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DT,
 'UNKNOWN'  AS INTERNAL_USE_CD,
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
 'I' DML_TYPE,
 COALESCE(SCOOHA.REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,
 COALESCE(SCOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS   RETURN_REASON_CODE,
 SCOOHA.REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD,
COALESCE(NPPT_ECCI.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,-999) END_CUST_ERP_CNTCT_PRTY_KEY/* priyavij:Added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
FROM    
$$STGDB.WI1_SALES_ORDER_V1_CG1 SCOOHA 
INNER JOIN 
(
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
ON
(NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
)
ON	
(SCOOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_TV_DAC NSOT
ON SCOOHA.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
ON  ( SCOOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SEL ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,ERP_CONTACT_ID,CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE,COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_SOLD  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI1_SALES_ORDER_V1_CG1 SCOOHA
ON   ( NPPT_SOLD.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID AS VARCHAR(50))
AND       NPPT_SOLD.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' /*AND NPPT_SOLD.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y' *//* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
AND SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID   IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
) NPPT_SOLD
ON          ( NPPT_SOLD.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID AS VARCHAR(50))  
AND       NPPT_SOLD.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' /*AND NPPT_SOLD.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y'*/ /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
   
          
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SEL ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,ERP_CONTACT_ID,CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE,COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_SHIP  JOIN $$STGDB.WI1_SALES_ORDER_V1_CG1 SCOOHA
ON          ( NPPT_SHIP.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA. SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID AS VARCHAR(50))  
AND       NPPT_SHIP.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' /*AND NPPT_SHIP.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y'*/ /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
AND SCOOHA. SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID     IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
                ) NPPT_SHIP
                ON          (NPPT_SHIP.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID AS VARCHAR(50))  
                AND       NPPT_SHIP.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' /*AND NPPT_SHIP.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y'*/ /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
 
  
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                ( SEL ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,ERP_CONTACT_ID,CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE,COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE
                FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_BILL  JOIN $$STGDB.WI1_SALES_ORDER_V1_CG1 SCOOHA
                ON          ( NPPT_BILL.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA. INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID AS VARCHAR(50))   
                AND       NPPT_BILL.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' /*AND NPPT_BILL.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y'*/ /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
                AND SCOOHA. INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID     IS NOT NULL 
                GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
                ) NPPT_BILL
                ON          ( NPPT_BILL.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID AS VARCHAR(50))  
                AND       NPPT_BILL.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' /*AND NPPT_BILL.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y'*/ /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
                
               
 /*priyavij:Below Join added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,ERP_CONTACT_ID,CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE
FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_ECCI 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPP
ON NPPT_ECCI.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY = NPP.PARTY_KEY 
AND NPP.SS_CODE='CG' 
AND NPPT_ECCI.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' 
JOIN $$STGDB.WI1_SALES_ORDER_V1_CG1 SCOOHA
ON          NPPT_ECCI.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_ID AS VARCHAR(50))
AND SCOOHA. END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_ID     IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) NPPT_ECCI
  ON          (NPPT_ECCI.ERP_CONTACT_ID = CAST(SCOOHA.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_ID  AS VARCHAR(50))
                AND       NPPT_ECCI.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' )                  

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM EAPT  
                ON          (EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID = SCOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID  
                AND       EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME) 
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SELECT RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY FROM 
(SELECT RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,CS_SO_TASK_OBSOLETE_FLG FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK
  QUALIFY RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY ORDER BY CS_SO_TASK_CREATED_DTM DESC,SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT DESC)=1) A
  WHERE CS_SO_TASK_OBSOLETE_FLG = 'N') NCST 
ON     ( SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NCST.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY ) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT SALES_ORDER_KEY FROM 
(SELECT SALES_ORDER_KEY, SO_ECOMMERCE_OPERATION_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_ECOMMERCE
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_KEY ORDER BY BK_SO_ECOMMERCE_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1) A
WHERE SO_ECOMMERCE_OPERATION_CD='INSERT') NSOE
ON    ( SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOE.SALES_ORDER_KEY ) 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCOOHA.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SCOOHA.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) =1
